query: SELECT dogId, imageUrl, createdAt, addedByStaffName, notes FROM dog_records WHERE teamIdentifier = 'bold-otter' AND imageUrl LIKE '%-annotated-%' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
